origin.capability_match: Tie social airdrop allocations to a wallet via social login

attack_surface.data_description: High volume of social login requests or linkage attempts.

security_gap.gap_description: Lack of rate limiting, resource exhaustion vulnerabilities, or dependency on third-party social media APIs that can be overwhelmed or throttled.

actor_risk.description: The user's ability to participate in the airdrop via social linking is dependent on the availability of both the airdrop platform and the third-party social media authentication service.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Prevents users from accessing their airdrop if social linking is the only method, causing frustration and potentially missed opportunity if time-limited.

assumptions: The social login or wallet linkage endpoints on Component 202 or the Social Media Platform (Component 234) are vulnerable to request flooding or resource exhaustion.
Rate limiting or other anti-DoS measures are insufficient or not implemented.
The airdrop linkage is time-sensitive, making temporary DoS impactful.

mitigation.strategy: Implement robust rate limiting, IP blacklisting for abusive sources, and resilient infrastructure for social login integration points. Have contingency plans if a social media provider's auth service is down.

description: An attacker launches a Denial of Service attack against the social login integration endpoints of the Airdrop Checker website (Component 202) or the Social Media Platform (Component 234), preventing legitimate 'Social Media Platform Users' (Actor 11) from tying their social airdrop allocations (Asset 117) to their wallets.

trace_source.matched_capability: Tie social airdrop allocations to a wallet via social login
